prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等北大优势工科专业社会热度持续高热；本省2026年物理类考生数约20.8万人，与2025年基本持平，竞争格局稳定；北京大学位于北京，属全国性顶尖名校，无显著地域偏好偏差；该校在贵州省招生占比极小（约0.02），跨省竞争格局稳定。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 51→45→→43→60, fluctuating within the range of 43-60; the 2025 baseline is about 60, which is about 17 places lower than 2024 (43), indicating reduced competition; the university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Guizhou Province: 17 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 16 in 2024, 19 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 29, an expansion of about 52.6% compared to 2025, with a notable expansion rate, and competition pressure is expected to ease significantly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; ranked 2nd in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (stable at 2nd from 2021 to 2026), a top national institution, strongly attractive to high-scoring candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety, admission controversies, etc., but as a top prestigious school, negative public opinion has limited impact on application popularity; Douyin popularity ranking 3rd (high heat), with high short video exposure, maintaining high application attention; the 2025 abnormal admission signal is high attention, with a first-time vacancy in Hubei early batch, but it is an isolated case; Peking University has a large number of A+/A-level disciplines, including Law A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Mathematics A+, Physics A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, Business Administration A+, Economics A+, etc., with top national disciplinary strength, strongly attractive to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, and other advantageous engineering majors at Peking University continue to have high social popularity; the number of physics category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 208,000, roughly the same as in 2025, with a stable competition landscape; Peking University is located in Beijing, a top national prestigious school, with no significant regional preference bias; the university's enrollment proportion in Guizhou Province is extremely small (about 0.02), with a stable cross-provincial competition landscape.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 60, the significant expansion of about 52.6% in 2026 which eases competition, and the sustained attraction of Peking University's top prestigious status to high-scoring candidates, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to shift back to about 79; range 70–88.
